creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
Version 4.10.4 was deployed as war file and I used it together with jetty which worked fine.
The new version 5 seems to have now everything on board to run as standalone application.
I configured to necessary parameters in /etc/rc.conf to point to currect solr_instance and to enable the startup script.

But it fails to execute.
Reason is the file /usr/local/share/examples/apache-solr/start.jar is not existing as required by the startup script.

Could you please ass this script to the package?
